# Daily Report — 2026-07-03

## Task Completed
Added `list_scheduled_jobs` tool targeting the `sysauto_script` table. Supports
filtering by job name (substring), active state, run_as user name, and run_type
(daily/weekly/monthly/once/periodically). Results are ordered by name and include
full schedule settings (run_type, run_period, run_start, run_time, run_at,
run_dayofmonth, run_dayofweek), the script body, and the run_as display name.
Pagination via has_more/next_offset. Registered in system_administrator and full
packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 2002
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes
- New tests: 27 (scheduled_job_tools.py 96% coverage)

No vulnerabilities found (pip-audit clean)
